zh.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Dallingridge於大約1311年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Sir John Dalingridge33歲，母親Joan de la Lynde11309歲。他和Alice Radingden至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1380年在英國享年71歲。

zh-hans.Beddington, Surrey, England: 英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Dallingridge于大约1311年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Sir John Dalingridge33岁，母亲Joan de la Lynde11309岁。他和Alice Radingden至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1380年在英国享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Dallingridge was born about 1311, in Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Dalingridge, was 33 and his mother, Joan de la Lynde, was 11309. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Radingden. He died about 1380, in England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Dallingridge est né environ 1311, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dalingridge, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Lynde, avait 11309 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Radingden. Il est décédé environ 1380, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Dallingridge um 1311 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Dalingridge 33 und seine Mutter Joan de la Lynde 11309. Er hatte mit Alice Radingden mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1380 im Alter von 71 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Dallingridge è nato il circa 1311 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Dalingridge, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan de la Lynde, aveva 11309 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Radingden. Morì circa 1380, nel England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Dallingridgeが約1311年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir John Dalingridgeは33歳，母Joan de la Lyndeは11309歳であった。彼はAlice Radingdenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1380年にイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Dallingridge(이)가 대략 1311년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Dalingridge(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de la Lynde(은)는 11309세였다. 그는 Alice Radingden(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Dallingridge nasceu aproximadamente 1311, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Dalingridge, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Lynde, tinha 11309 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Radingden. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1380, em Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Dallingridge родился около 1311 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Dalingridge было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Lynde, 11309. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Alice Radingden. Он умер около 1380 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Dallingridge nació aproximadamente 1311, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Dalingridge, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan de la Lynde, tenía 11309 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Radingden. Murió aproximadamente 1380, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
